Lore Item
Slot: FINGER
AC: 2
STR: +2 WIS: +6 MANA: +10
WT: 0.1 Size: TINY
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Golem Tear Ring
Lore Item
Slot: FINGER
AC: 2
STR: +2 WIS: +6 MANA: +10
WT: 0.1 Size: TINY
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)

Item Type:Jewelry
Stackable:No
Merchant Value:2 pp 5 gp 0 sp 0 cp
Tribute:672
Lucy Entry By:Kerasota
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-12-12 22:50:55
Page Updated:Fri Jun 26th, 2009

Expansion: Ruins of Kunark
Average Price: No Data Pricing Data...
Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 45

Chardok

a chardoki golem
a crystal shard golem
an Ancient Guardian
an imperial construct

Chardok

drop
QuoteReply
# May 11 2005 at 3:47 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592265278976
Scholar
130 posts
Dropped off an imperial construct in Chardok, at the entrance to the palace area.
▲ Page top
not bad...
QuoteReply
# Jul 22 2002 at 2:16 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591766647124
45 posts
this isnt a bad ring for any class that uses wis. my cleric uses it, she gave up a Velium Jasper ring for it (wis+7). she actually gained mana because of the wis cap or whatevever you want to call it, i think after about +200 wis or int you only get +2 mana for every wis/int after 200, and since my cleric had 251 wis she now only has 250, but has +8 more mana now from this ring and ac+2 and str+2 to boot. got it got 500p on Bristlebane.


Dawwn Keypunch
27 Cleric
Bristlebane
▲ Page top
Update?
QuoteReply
# May 26 2002 at 3:07 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592253277117
View User Forum
17 posts
Don't know, but I've heard that it now improves Blacksmithing skill by some percentage.

Edited, Sun May 26 03:57:57 2002

# May 15 2002 at 11:16 AM Rating: Decent

▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Apr 18 2002 at 5:14 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) How is it not obvious this is a bard item? No one needs more STR than we, and WIS is our most important stat, and where would we be without our mana?!
5K? right...
QuoteReply
# Mar 19 2002 at 7:40 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591761566162
20 posts
Bought this for 800pp on Torvo. Seems about right. 400pp more than a +7 Wis ring for the AC and strength (and of course, rarity). "Best" class? I'd say cleric (character I bought it for). Clerics can always use AC, Wis, Mana, and to a lesser degree, Str. Not an item I've seen for sale much.
▲ Page top
5k?
QuoteReply
# Mar 15 2002 at 5:07 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592252640498
14 posts
I know my druid is only 34, but I just can't see spending 4 or 5k for this. I bought a pair of velium jasper rings for 750, even with the lower mana gain with wisdom over 200, (I'm at 202) I guess I'd rather save my money for crystal chitin pieces. As a druid the ac and str just don't seem likely to save my bacon. Not the first item I've shrugged my shoulders at due to price.
▲ Page top
my 2cp
QuoteReply
# Mar 13 2002 at 10:22 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591752191797
Scholar
198 posts
I would give up 1wis from a vel jasp for this, the AC/str are worth it even on my little dr00d but if you wanted to say who this is best for I'd say ALL priest classes (clr/dru/shm) primarily and then MAYBE rng/pal if the priest classes didn't want.

No wait, it weighs 0.1 so forget that, MONK ITEM!
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Nov 08 2001 at 1:35 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) druid ring.
RE: best class
QuoteReply
# Nov 23 2001 at 12:09 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592251218403
View User Forum
Scholar
59 posts
I love the disuccion "Which class should only get this?" LOL

Why would the ring be better for a druid then other classes?

AC? AC is nice. Don't slow druids the mobs and run around while kitting? They don't melee ether.

STR? Str is nice. Druids can't wear the heavy plate armor and they don't melee.

WIS? Sure, but a velium jasper ring has 7wis.

MANA? 10mana is not great but could save you. When your level is high enough your total mana will be higher with the velium jasper ring.

Bilm
▲ Page top
RE: best class
QuoteReply
# Nov 13 2001 at 10:24 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591753506424
View User Forum
15 posts
So, this is a druid ring, huh? Well, then I, as a Cleric, shouldn't try to roll for this ring. Since it is a druid ring.

Best class? Give me a break! Remember that the next time you need a Rez...

# Sep 13 2002 at 10:19 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592255467888
185 posts
maybe you should go to bertoxx server, because no druids whine here... and that ring, even though it is -1 in wisdom, that is way better than the platinum jasper ring... which sucks for me, because I cannot find another velium ring for the life of me... and about the whole best class deal... any class could use this, but it's better for WISDOM spellcasters in my opinion... or maybe a newbie untwinked tank... but they could prolly get better... so, my final thought is this...
who gives a **** as to who this is better for, right? i think's it's useless to say who it's better for... then again, i'm an idiot
